# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for server-side request forgery (SSRF) and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any outbound requests to user-provided URLs or hosts without destination validation, IP filtering, or redirect controls.
4. Add strict destination validation, internal-address blocking, and redirect/network egress protections.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: ssrf

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import axios from 'axios';
import * as cheerio from 'cheerio';
import { URL } from 'url';
import * as net from 'net';
import * as dns from 'dns';
import { promisify } from 'util';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

const dnsLookup = promisify(dns.lookup);

const ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS = ['http:', 'https:'];
const BLOCKED_IP_RANGES = [
  { start: '10.0.0.0', end: '10.255.255.255' },
  { start: '172.16.0.0', end: '172.31.255.255' },
  { start: '192.168.0.0', end: '192.168.255.255' },
  { start: '127.0.0.0', end: '127.255.255.255' },
  { start: '169.254.0.0', end: '169.254.255.255' },
  { start: '0.0.0.0', end: '0.255.255.255' },
  { start: '224.0.0.0', end: '255.255.255.255' },
  { start: '::1', end: '::1' },
  { start: 'fc00::', end: 'fdff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff' },
  { start: 'fe80::', end: 'febf:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff' },
];

const BLOCKED_DOMAINS = ['localhost', 'metadata', 'internal'];

function ipToLong(ip: string): bigint {
  if (net.isIPv6(ip)) {
    const parts = ip.split(':').filter(p => p !== '');
    let result = BigInt(0);
    for (const part of parts) {
      result = (result << BigInt(16)) + BigInt(parseInt(part || '0', 16));
    }
    return result;
  }
  
  const parts = ip.split('.');
  return parts.reduce((acc, octet) => (acc << BigInt(8)) + BigInt(parseInt(octet)), BigInt(0));
}

function isIpBlocked(ip: string): boolean {
  if (!net.isIP(ip)) {
    return true;
  }

  const ipLong = ipToLong(ip);

  for (const range of BLOCKED_IP_RANGES) {
    const startLong = ipToLong(range.start);
    const endLong = ipToLong(range.end);
    
    if (ipLong >= startLong && ipLong <= endLong) {
      return true;
    }
  }

  return false;
}

async function validateUrl(urlString: string): Promise<string> {
  let parsedUrl: URL;
  
  try {
    parsedUrl = new URL(urlString);
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error('Invalid URL format');
  }

  if (!ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS.includes(parsedUrl.protocol)) {
    throw new Error('Protocol not allowed. Only HTTP and HTTPS are supported');
  }

  const hostname = parsedUrl.hostname.toLowerCase();

  for (const blocked of BLOCKED_DOMAINS) {
    if (hostname === blocked || hostname.endsWith(`.${blocked}`)) {
      throw new Error('Domain not allowed');
    }
  }

  try {
    const { address } = await dnsLookup(hostname);
    
    if (isIpBlocked(address)) {
      throw new Error('IP address is in a blocked range');
    }
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof Error && error.message.includes('blocked')) {
      throw error;
    }
    throw new Error('Unable to resolve hostname');
  }

  return urlString;
}

app.post('/api/link-preview', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const url: string = req.body.url;

    if (!url || typeof url !== 'string') {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'URL is required and must be a string' });
    }

    const validatedUrl = await validateUrl(url);

    const response = await axios.get(validatedUrl, {
      timeout: 5000,
      maxRedirects: 3,
      maxContentLength: 5 * 1024 * 1024,
      validateStatus: (status) => status >= 200 && status < 300,
      headers: {
        'User-Agent': 'LinkPreviewBot/1.0'
      },
      beforeRedirect: (options, responseDetails) => {
        if (options.hostname) {
          const redirectHostname = options.hostname.toLowerCase();
          
          for (const blocked of BLOCKED_DOMAINS) {
            if (redirectHostname === blocked || redirectHostname.endsWith(`.${blocked}`)) {
              throw new Error('Redirect to blocked domain');
            }
          }
        }
      }
    });

    const $ = cheerio.load(response.data);

    let title = $('meta[property="og:title"]').attr('content') ||
                $('meta[name="twitter:title"]').attr('content') ||
                $('title').text() ||
                '';

    let description = $('meta[property="og:description"]').attr('content') ||
                      $('meta[name="twitter:description"]').attr('content') ||
                      $('meta[name="description"]').attr('content') ||
                      '';

    title = title.trim().substring(0, 200);
    description = description.trim().substring(0, 500);

    return res.json({
      url: validatedUrl,
      title,
      description
    });

  } catch (error) {
    if (axios.isAxiosError(error)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch URL content' });
    }
    
    if (error instanceof Error) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: error.message });
    }
    
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  }
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`Server running on port ${PORT}`);
});
